data.title: HSBC Appoints New CFO for Asia and Middle East Amid Leadership Changes
data.description: HSBC has announced the appointment of Jack Yang as the new Chief Financial Officer for Asia and the Middle East. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting this move as part of a broader leadership overhaul led by CEO Georges Elhedery. Yang's appointment is the latest in a series of strategic changes aimed at strengthening the bank's operations in these key regions. HSBC continues to focus on enhancing its financial management and operational efficiency under Elhedery's leadership.

data.title: Hyperliquid Strategies Launches PURR Options on Nasdaq to Enhance Liquidity
data.description:
Hyperliquid Strategies Inc announced on Tuesday the introduction of options trading for its common stock PURR on the Nasdaq options market. According to ChainCatcher, this move aims to improve the liquidity and price discovery mechanism of PURR shares, offering investors a capital-efficient way to access Hyperliquid's native token, HYPE. Hyperliquid Strategies focuses on maximizing shareholder value through staking, yield optimization, and ecosystem participation.

David Schamis, CEO of Hyperliquid Strategies, stated that this development marks a significant milestone for the company. He emphasized that PURR options enable investors to better manage risk and engage with the rapid growth of Hyperliquid's high-performance ecosystem.

Schamis highlighted that the launch coincides with record growth for Hyperliquid, driven by increased trading volumes of oil perpetual contracts and other tokenized real-world assets. Within just six months of its introduction, Hyperliquid's perpetual futures market for tokenized traditional assets, HIP-3, has reached a new peak with a total open interest of $1.74 billion.

data.title: Russia Criticizes U.S. and Israel for Threatening Iran's Nuclear Facility, Russian Envoy Says
data.description: Russia's Permanent Representative to International Organizations in Vienna, Mikhail Ulyanov, stated on March 24 that the International Atomic Energy Agency (IAEA) has confirmed that attacks by the U.S. and Israel on Iran's Bushehr nuclear power plant pose a threat to the facility's integrity. According to Jin10, Ulyanov emphasized that nuclear facilities are increasingly becoming targets of attacks, and actions by the U.S. and Israel within Iran are severely undermining the nuclear non-proliferation regime, including the Treaty on the Non-Proliferation of Nuclear Weapons. The statement highlights growing concerns over the security of nuclear sites amid geopolitical tensions.

data.title: Australia's Central Bank Explores Implementation of Wholesale Digital Tokens
data.description: Australia's central bank is now concentrating on the implementation of wholesale digital tokens in the financial system, as stated by Assistant Governor Brad Jones. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting this strategic shift in focus from the Reserve Bank of Australia. The move signifies a transition from questioning the role of digital tokens to actively exploring their integration into the financial infrastructure. This development reflects a broader trend among central banks globally, as they assess the potential benefits and challenges of digital currencies in modern financial systems.

data.title: Middle East Tensions Impact U.S. Markets and Oil Prices
data.description:
On March 25, the Middle East situation experienced multiple shifts, affecting U.S. markets and oil prices. According to BlockBeats, during U.S. trading hours, reports emerged that elements of the U.S. 82nd Airborne Division were set to deploy to the Middle East, causing market sentiment to deteriorate sharply. WTI crude oil briefly surged past $93 per barrel, leading to a plunge in U.S. stocks.

Later, U.S. President Donald Trump announced that the U.S. was in negotiations with Iran, stating that Iran had begun rational communication and agreed to never possess nuclear weapons. This led to a retreat in oil prices and U.S. Treasury yields from their highs, with the stock market recovering some losses. However, the three major U.S. stock indices still closed lower, while small-cap indices outperformed.

Post-market, Trump continued to raise expectations for peace talks, suggesting that U.S.-Iran negotiations might be close to an agreement, with Iran agreeing never to possess nuclear weapons. Reports indicated that the U.S. was considering a one-month ceasefire and proposing 15 peace negotiation terms. This news caused WTI crude oil to plummet over 6% within an hour after trading, erasing most of the day's gains. The Nasdaq 100 futures index rose more than 1%.

Cryptocurrencies experienced relatively narrow fluctuations, with Bitcoin briefly dropping above $69,000 before recovering, currently priced at $70,634.74.

data.title: MUFG to Extend Mandatory Retirement Age to 65 Amid Aging Workforce
data.description: MUFG, Japan's largest megabank group, has announced plans to increase the mandatory retirement age from 60 to 65. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting this move as part of the bank's strategy to retain talent in the face of an aging population. This decision aligns with broader efforts in Japan to address workforce challenges posed by demographic shifts. By extending the retirement age, MUFG aims to leverage the experience and expertise of its senior employees, ensuring continued growth and stability in a competitive financial landscape.

data.title: Binance Wallet's 45th exclusive TGE offering will list Perle (PRL).
data.description: According to official news, Binance Wallet will launch an exclusive TGE for Perle Labs (PRL) in partnership with PancakeSwap on March 25, 2026, from 16:00 to 18:00 Beijing time. Eligible users will need to use Binance Alpha points to participate, and trading will begin at 18:00.

data.title: Morgan Stanley Pursues Spot Bitcoin ETF Amid Long-Term Crypto Strategy
data.description: Morgan Stanley has announced its intention to expand its presence in the cryptocurrency sector as part of a long-term strategy. According to NS3.AI, the bank is actively pursuing a spot bitcoin ETF within the approximately $120 billion spot bitcoin ETF market. Currently, Morgan Stanley offers spot bitcoin ETFs on E*Trade and has plans to support tokenized equities on its alternative trading system in the latter half of 2026.

data.title: U.S. Crude Oil Production Increases by 223,000 Barrels Per Day, API Reports
data.description: According to Jin10, the American Petroleum Institute (API) reported that U.S. crude oil production for the week ending March 20 increased by 223,000 barrels per day. This marks a rise from the previous week's production level of 147,000 barrels per day. The increase in production comes amid ongoing discussions about energy supply and demand dynamics in the global market. The API's data is closely watched by industry analysts and investors as it provides insights into the U.S. oil production trends and potential impacts on global oil prices.

data.title: Oil Prices Surge Amid Ongoing Tensions Between U.S. and Iran
data.description: U.S. President Donald Trump has claimed that the United States engaged in "productive dialogue" with Iran, although Iran denies any negotiations and accuses Trump of manipulating oil prices through false news. According to Ming Pao, the conflict between the U.S.-Israel alliance and Iran continues, with Israel asserting its commitment to "fully" combat Iran, further driving up oil prices. On Tuesday, Brent crude oil prices rose above $100 per barrel, reaching $104.35, while New York crude oil peaked at $92.68 per barrel. Meanwhile, the three major U.S. stock indices fell again in early trading. The yield on the U.S. two-year Treasury note, sensitive to interest rates, climbed to 3.9%, and the yield on the 10-year Treasury note increased to 4.4%.

data.title: Signs of Market Bottom and Risks for Banking Stocks in India
data.description: Today's analysis highlights potential indicators of a market bottom in India, alongside risks facing banking stocks and foreign outflows from bonds. Bloomberg posted on X, noting that the Indian market is showing signs of stabilization, which could suggest a bottoming out phase. However, banking stocks are facing challenges due to regulatory pressures and economic uncertainties. Additionally, there has been a noticeable trend of foreign investors withdrawing from Indian bonds, which could impact market dynamics. These developments are crucial for investors to monitor as they navigate the current economic landscape.

data.title: Account with over $1.3 million in profit and a total purchase of $420,000. NBA regular season game: Nuggets defeat Suns.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer's monitoring, in the Polymarket "NBA Regular Season Nuggets vs. Suns" prediction event, an account with over $1.3 million in profit (address: 0x6ac5bb06a9eb05641fd5e82640268b92f3ab4b6e) purchased $170,000 worth of bets on the Nuggets defeating the Suns at an opening price of 68.2¢. Additionally, it purchased $210,000 worth of bets on the Nuggets winning with a 5.5-point spread against the Suns at an opening price of 53¢; $21,000 worth of bets on the Nuggets winning with a 6.5-point spread against the Suns at an opening price of 48.9¢; and $15,000 worth of bets on the Nuggets winning with a 4.5-point spread against the Suns at an opening price of 57¢. The NBA Regular Season Nuggets vs. Suns game will start at 11:00 AM Beijing time today. The NBA regular season is currently nearing its end. The Denver Nuggets have a record of 44 wins and 28 losses, ranking 4th in the Western Conference; the Phoenix Suns have a record of 40 wins and 30 losses, ranking 7th in the Western Conference. Odaily Seer continues to monitor the prediction market, seeing changes before pricing.

data.title: Backpack: Suspected of manipulating market predictions by inflating BP's price; users are not members of the Backpack team.
data.description: Backpack stated on the X platform that a Polymarket trader held a large open position this morning, betting that BP's FDV would exceed $200 million the day after TGE. With the settlement window approaching, BP was trading at approximately $0.19, and it appears a trader was buying large amounts of BP tokens in an attempt to push the price above $0.20 to win bets on Polymarket. Backpack stated that it immediately launched an investigation and confirmed that these traders were not Backpack employees, directors, executives, or consultants, and had no affiliation with Backpack. Backpack emphasized its zero-tolerance policy towards any form of insider trading.

data.title: BRICS Explores Digital Clearing System for Local-Currency Payments
data.description: BRICS nations are examining the development of a digital clearing mechanism aimed at facilitating local-currency payments. According to NS3.AI, experts suggest that this system could be operational by 2026. The proposed mechanism is intended to serve as a settlement system and unit of account, rather than a comprehensive shared currency.

data.title: Germany Warns of Potential Energy Shortage Amid Middle East Tensions
data.description:
Germany's Federal Minister for Economic Affairs and Energy, Peter Altmaier, has warned of a potential energy shortage if the conflict involving the United States, Israel, and Iran continues. According to RTHK, Altmaier, speaking at an energy conference in Texas, emphasized that such a shortage could occur between late April and early May. He also criticized the phasing out of nuclear energy as a significant mistake and highlighted liquefied natural gas as a crucial solution to address the energy shortfall.

Additionally, German President Frank-Walter Steinmeier condemned the military actions by the United States and Israel against Iran, labeling them as clear violations of international law and a grave political error. During an event, Steinmeier remarked that since U.S. President Donald Trump began his second term, transatlantic relations have deteriorated, leading to a loss of political trust in the United States among allies and globally.

data.title: AI and Tokenization Lead Crypto Sector Growth Amid Geopolitical Challenges
data.description:
Grayscale Research has highlighted significant developments in the crypto sector despite macroeconomic volatility and geopolitical risks. Grayscale posted on X that tokenization saw a remarkable 245% year-on-year increase in tokenized assets. Additionally, stablecoin volumes have doubled compared to the previous year.

AI-linked tokens have also shown strong performance, driven by increasing demand for onchain infrastructure. These advancements suggest a more positive outlook for the crypto industry, even as broader market conditions remain challenging.

The report underscores the resilience of certain sectors within the crypto market, particularly those related to AI and tokenization, which have managed to thrive amid global uncertainties.

data.title: Nelson Peltz's Continued Interest in Janus Since 2020
data.description: Nelson Peltz has maintained a keen interest in Janus since 2020. Bloomberg posted on X, highlighting Peltz's ongoing focus on the company. His intentions appear to be aimed at completing the objectives he set out to achieve three years ago. Peltz's strategic moves have been closely watched by industry analysts, as he seeks to influence the direction of Janus. The developments surrounding his involvement continue to be a point of interest in the financial sector.

data.title: On Polymarket, the probability of the U.S. Department of Homeland Security ending its shutdown by the end of March is currently reported at 54%, down 26% in one hour.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, the U.S. Senate has voted to approve Senator Marin as Secretary of Homeland Security. The probability of the "Department of Homeland Security shutdown ending March 31" event on Polymarket has dropped to 54%, a 26% decrease in one hour, with trading volume approaching $1 million. Meanwhile, the probability of the "Department of Homeland Security shutdown ending by the end of March" event saw a brief surge, currently at 24%, a 13% increase in one hour; the probability of the "Department of Homeland Security shutdown ending March 24-27" event is currently at 13%, a 3% increase in one hour. At her nomination hearing last week, Marin expressed support for the Trump administration's immigration policies. Marin also urged Democrats to quickly pass the budget bill for the Department of Homeland Security to "reopen" the department. During the hearing, Marin stated, "As Secretary of Homeland Security, I will protect everyone, and my goal for the next six months is to keep the Department of Homeland Security out of the headlines every day." Since last year, the Department of Homeland Security has frequently made headlines due to its efforts to combat illegal immigration and other issues. Democrats are demanding reforms to the Department of Homeland Security and federal law enforcement, threatening not to support a budget for the department if it fails to do so. The Department of Homeland Security has been shut down since February 14 due to running out of funds. Odaily Seer continues to monitor the prediction market, seeing changes before pricing them in.

data.title: SlowMist: Attackers have stolen approximately 300GB of data due to the LiteLLM vulnerability.
data.description: 23pds (Shan Ge), Chief Information Security Officer of SlowMist, posted on the X platform that reports indicate attackers exploiting the LiteLLM vulnerability have stolen approximately 300GB of data and about 500,000 credentials. He advised all cryptocurrency developers to immediately review and rotate relevant keys and credentials as soon as possible, and to check logs, access records, and sensitive data exposure to avoid losses similar to the Trust Wallet incident. Previously, it was reported that LiteLLM, with 97 million monthly downloads, was attacked by the supply chain, allowing for the theft of SSH keys and all sensitive credentials with a simple installation.

data.title: A whale withdrew 33,998 ETH from Kraken, worth approximately $72.9 million.
data.description: According to The Data Nerd, a whale (0xD77...A7Bb) withdrew 33,998 ETH from Kraken 5 hours ago, worth approximately $72.9 million.
